speaker: speaker1
text: We are approaching the top of the mountain .

speaker: speaker2
text: What a beautiful view we have here .

speaker: speaker1
text: Yes , you can have a bird's-eye view of the whole city .

speaker: speaker2
text: Wonderful . Will we have any free time there ?

speaker: speaker1
text: Of course . We will stay there for half an hour and you can do your own business .
